name: restaurant-pos
description: A professional full-stack restaurant point-of-sale, kitchen, inventory, receipt and staff-management system

scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix backend run lint
scripts.verify: npm --prefix backend run db:validate && npm --prefix backend run db:status && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix backend run lint
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend install
